message:
chore(beads): re-close FCP3 P7 cutover + final-proof beads after JSONL force-import

Re-closed 16 additional beads (24llg.7.4, 24llg.1.3, 24llg.1, 24llg
initiative; ukr33.2, ukr33; 8bqme.1, 8bqme.2, 8bqme.3, 8bqme;
84phy.1, 84phy.2, 84phy; t1hy0; 2vdwq) — all already-shipped FCP3
phase-7 cutover and final-proof work that landed in commits between
2026-04-10 and 2026-04-19 but was reset to open by the recent JSONL
force-import. Verified each commit's artifacts (FCP3_Final_Proof_Manifest,
Go_No_Go_Review_Record, Final_Closure_Checklist, Operational_Proof_Index,
Semantic_Conformance_Proof_Index, Benchmark_Comparison etc.) remain in
tree before closing.

Backlog: 27 open → 3 open. FCP3 mesh-first refoundation now shows as
closed across all 7 phases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
